choking.name: Choking
immediate_actions: Perform Heimlich maneuver: Stand behind person, place fist above navel
Quick upward thrusts until object dislodges
do_not: Do not slap on back if conscious
Do not give food or water
choking.recovery: Monitor breathing, keep person calm, seek medical attention

chest pain.name: Chest Pain / Possible Heart Attack
immediate_actions: Have person sit or lie down
Chew aspirin if available and not allergic
do_not: Do not have person exert themselves
Do not give food or water

difficulty breathing.name: Difficulty Breathing / Shortness of Breath
immediate_actions: If asthma, use inhaler if available

severe bleeding.name: Severe Bleeding
immediate_actions: Apply direct pressure with clean cloth
Elevate injured area above heart if possible
Apply tourniquet if limb bleeding cannot be controlled
do_not: Do not apply tourniquet unless necessary

unconsciousness.name: Unconsciousness / Loss of Consciousness
immediate_actions: Place in recovery position if breathing
do_not: Do not give food or water

severe allergic reaction.name: Severe Allergic Reaction / Anaphylaxis
immediate_actions: Have person lie down with legs elevated
do_not: Do not give food or water

poisoning.name: Poisoning / Overdose
immediate_actions: Remove person from source if toxic gas
Keep sample of poison if possible
do_not: Do not give activated charcoal without guidance

severe burns.name: Severe Burns
immediate_actions: Cool burn with cool (not cold) water for 10-20 minutes
Remove tight clothing if not stuck
do_not: Do not use butter or oil

fracture.name: Fracture / Broken Bone
immediate_actions: Do not move the injured area
do_not: Do not move the injured area
fracture.recovery: Seek medical attention for X-ray and treatment

head injury.name: Head Injury / Concussion
immediate_actions: Do not move neck if possible
do_not: Do not apply direct pressure if bleeding

stroke.name: Stroke
immediate_actions: Do not give food or water
do_not: Do not give food or water

seizure.name: Seizure
immediate_actions: Call ambulance if first seizure or prolonged
Protect from injury, move away sharp objects
Stay with person until fully conscious
do_not: Do not put anything in mouth

hypothermia.name: Hypothermia
immediate_actions: Give warm (not hot) drinks if conscious

heat stroke.name: Heat Stroke
immediate_actions: Cool body with water or ice packs
Do not give food or water if confused
do_not: Do not give food or water if confused

electric shock.name: Electric Shock
immediate_actions: Turn off power source if safe
Do not touch person if still in contact
do_not: Do not touch person if still in contact

eye injury.name: Eye Injury
immediate_actions: Flush with clean water if chemical

abdominal pain.name: Severe Abdominal Pain
immediate_actions: Do not give food or water
do_not: Do not give food or water
Do not apply heat if appendicitis suspected

fainting.name: Fainting / Syncope
do_not: Do not give food or water immediately
Do not sit person up too quickly
fainting.recovery: Rest and seek medical attention if repeated
